_notes.greeting_morning: [PLACEHOLDER] {name} is user display name. [GENDER HOOK] ES formal register may require gendered greeting adjectives.
_notes.notifications_new_singular: [PLURAL] Use ICU plural rules for target locale. ES: una nueva notificación / {count} notificaciones nuevas. DE: {count} neue Benachrichtigung / {count} neue Benachrichtigungen.
_notes.notifications_new_plural: [PLURAL] See notes on singular form above.

projects.empty_state_body: Create your first project and start building your sound.
projects.storage_upgrade_prompt: You're using {percent}% of your storage. {upgrade_link} for more.

_notes.project_card_bpm_label: BPM = Beats Per Minute. Universal abbreviation in music production — do not translate. Keep as 'BPM' in all locales.
_notes.project_card_key_label: Musical key indicator (e.g. 'A minor'). Short label — keep concise.
_notes.project_card_last_edited: [PLACEHOLDER] {time_ago} is a relative time string generated at runtime (e.g. '2 hours ago'). Relative time strings are localised separately by the date/time library.
_notes.project_card_delete_confirm: [PLACEHOLDER] {project_name} is user-generated content — do not translate the placeholder. Quotation marks may adapt to locale typography conventions.
_notes.storage_used_label: [PLACEHOLDER] {used} and {total} are formatted storage values (e.g. '18.3 GB'). Units handled separately.
_notes.storage_upgrade_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {percent} is an integer. {upgrade_link} is an inline hyperlink. [EXPANSION RISK]

_notes.field_bpm_label: BPM is the technical abbreviation — keep as-is. 'Tempo' may be localised.
_notes.template_singer_songwriter: [EXPANSION RISK] Hyphenated compound. DE expansion expected.
_notes.template_film_score: Film score = the musical score of a film, not a rating. Clarify for translators.
_notes.template_sound_design: Recognised professional term. Anglicism preferred in ES and DE — confirm with Black Ice ontology.

studio.ai_composition_hint: Generate melodies, chord progressions, and drum patterns powered by ECHOCRAFT AI.

_notes.track_type_midi: MIDI is a technical acronym — do not translate. 'track' may be localised.
_notes.toolbar_save_status_saving: Trailing ellipsis (…) indicates loading state. Preserve in all locales.
_notes.toolbar_save_status_saved: [EXPANSION RISK] Status bar — limited display space. DE: 'Alle Änderungen gespeichert' is significantly longer.
_notes.ai_composition_label: Must match the pillar name 'AI Composition' exactly. Cross-reference with onboarding.plan_features.melody_generator etc.
_notes.ai_composition_hint: [EXPANSION RISK] Three feature names inline. Monitor German compound noun expansion.
